title: CloudZero Billing Drop
description: Represents cost data in CloudZero Common Bill Format (CBF) for ingestion via the AnyCost Stream Adaptor.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the billing line item.

cost.description: Cost amount for the line item.

service.description: Service name associated with the cost.

description.description: Description of the cost line item.

metadata.description: Additional metadata key-value pairs for the line item.

line_items.description: Array of cost line items in Common Bill Format.
